name: New Zealand Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the first three ingredients (margarine, sugar, and cocoa) together until bubbly.
2. Remove from heat and add the egg, beating well.
3. Incorporate the remaining ingredients (graham cracker crumbs, vanilla, and raisins).
4. Pack the mixture into a greased 8x8 cake pan.
5. Cover with chocolate icing and refrigerate.
Source: Jean Hopkins-Mom
